# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: default-allow-all
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: default-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      identities:
        - "*"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: ""
    kind: Namespace
    name: default
  requiredAuthenticationSchemes:
    - mtls
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: cluster-mesh-tls
  namespace: default
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
      except:
        - cidr: 10.1.0.0/16
  meshTLS:
    identities:
      - "*"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: cluster-authenticated
  namespace: default
spec:
  identities:
    - "*.default.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
    - "*.linkerd.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
  identityRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: "*"
      namespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: default-http-route
  namespace: default
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: default-server
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /
      backendRefs:
        - name: default-backend
          port: 8080
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-unauthenticated
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: core
    kind: Service
    name: "*"
  requiredAuthenticationSchemes:
    - mtls
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: grpc-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: gRPC
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: grpc-allow-authenticated
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: grpc-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: "*"
          namespace: default
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-policy-config
  namespace: default
data:
  default-policy: |
    defaultPolicy: allow-authenticated
    discoveryMode: enabled
    opaquePorts: "25,587,3306,5432,6379,9300,11211"
  policy-mode: "default-allow"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: tcp-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: tcp
  proxyProtocol: unknown
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: tcp-allow-mesh
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: tcp-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      identities:
        - "*.default.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-namespace-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: ""
    kind: Namespace
    name: default
  requiredAuthenticationSchemes:
    - mtls
    - unauthenticated
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-same-namespace
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    selector:
      matchLabels: {}
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - namespace: default
          name: "*"
